creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Sonarr v3 has a new release with the sqlite3 issue resolved.
As stated by the sonarr team:

20:23 markus101 │ v4 is beta, definitely don't update to that yet

So thank you all for the time and cycles spent on this PR, but please don't commit and push this update yet.
I'll keep maintaining my local sonarr-devel port to test the v4 updates until it lands in main.
For those that switched to this patch: Let me know if you are running into any trouble.
